title: Australian Crunchy Toast Crumble
description: A crispy and crunchy twist on traditional toast crumble, topped with fresh Australian ingredients.
instructions: 2. Cut the Australian bread into 1-inch cubes and toast until lightly browned.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the crunchy granola and crumble topping.
4. In a separate pan, heat the milk over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
5. Add the fresh strawberries to the milk and cook until they start to soften.
6. Assemble the toast crumble by layering the toasted bread, strawberry mixture, and crunchy granola mixture.
7. Drizzle with honey if desired and serve immediately.
